_comment: A/B hero image specs for Talking Robot. 1500×1500 Etsy thumbnails. Features: TTS + STT + 13 animated emotions + 16 voice locales (8 Arabic regionals), optional micro:bit V2 BLE face mirror.

heroes.name: hero-teacher
heroes.title:
Make Robots Talk.
13 Emotions. 16 Voices.
heroes.subtitle: Text-to-speech · speech recognition · 8 Arabic regionals · PWA-installable

heroes.title:
Type. Speak.
Change Face.
heroes.subtitle: Happy, silly, scared, party, sleepy, robot, nerdy… 13 emotions on one friendly robot.
heroes.footerLeft: Works on Chromebook · No account, no cloud

heroes.title:
BLE Face Mirror
on a micro:bit.
heroes.subtitle: Per-syllable N_word tokens · EMO:name commands · 5×5 LED emotion mirror
